title: SPBR-RGBRedstone
description: Wow, this experimental pack's redstone wires looks so cool.
body:
# SPBR RGB Redstone Patch  
This is a Patch Pack for [SPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr)  
This pack was a test bench of SPBR-14_5 but the visual effect is amazing, so I keep it as a standalone SPBR Patch Pack.XD  
**This Pack is made under LabPBR standard**  
If you want to use this pack you need a LabPBR supported Shader.  
![RGB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cac6b7f2b837e00abaff903be307f3b62e362a9.jpeg)  
![WOW](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d3cd66b6888aa98506702289e84b1772b3eecfe.jpeg)  
_This Pack Can Be Use Alone._
